title: Bits left unset in function call

features.name: large function return with partial bit initialization
features.description: Code should include a function returning a large vector (>32 bits) where only a subset of bits are explicitly initialized in the loop body, leaving upper bits uninitialized

features.name: large vector assignment from concatenation
features.description: Code should include an assignment to a large vector (>32 bits) where the concatenation only fills a subset of bits, with upper bits potentially unset
